prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海综合最低位次约9895→10493→10565→11462→12020，整体呈逐年后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2125名；2025年基准约12020名；本 省计划2021–2024年均为20人，2025年增至21人；2026年计划18人，较2025年缩招约14.3%，招生名额减少理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设 高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第54名，近年排名在48–55区间波动，整体稳定；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区不明巨型生物活动） ，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音综合热度排名第98（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；材料科学与工程A、机械工程A-、交通运输工程A-，在材料、交通、汽 车领域有较强学科实力，对理工类考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化类、人工智能等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年考生总数约66700人， 较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，距上海较远，上海考生对本地及长三角高校 偏好较强，跨省报考存在一定地域折价。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招（缓和竞争）、本省考生总数大幅增加（加剧竞争）以及声誉偏负面 等因素，考虑考生规模激增的竞争压力大于缩招的缓和效应，预测最低位次约11190名，区间10690–11690名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Shanghai Comprehensive was approximately 9895 → 10493 → 10565 → 11462 → 12020, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2125 positions in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 12020; the provincial enrollment plan was 20 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 21 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18 students, a reduction of about 14.3% compared to 2025, and the decrease in enrollment numbers theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 54th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48 and 55, overall stable; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity at Nanhu Campus), which may mildly suppress application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 98th (average), with low short video exposure; Materials Science and Engineering is rated A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Transportation Engineering A-, showing strong disciplinary strength in materials, transportation, and automotive fields, attracting some science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Artificial Intelligence have consistently high social popularity; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, far from Shanghai, and Shanghai students have a strong preference for local and Yangtze River Delta universities, so cross-province applications face some geographical discount.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province (intensifying competition), and the negative reputation, the competitive pressure from the surge in examinees outweighs the easing effect of the enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11,190, with a range of 10,690 to 11,690.
